**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Bosidun Intelligent Equipment Co., Ltd. is officially cataloged under the heavy-industry label of 'Electronic Device Manufacturing', with a business scope extravagantly claiming 'Industrial Robot Manufacturing' and 'Special Equipment Design'. The Dual-Veto forensic logic instantly exposes this hyperbole. The entity reported just 1 insured employee in 2024 and a minimal paid-in capital of 200,000 RMB. Crucially, its registered address is '2nd Floor, Building 9, R&F City'—a commercial/residential apartment building within an innovation park. It is physically and financially impossible to manufacture industrial robots or special heavy equipment in a 2nd-floor apartment with a single employee. By analyzing the former name ('Nanjing Bosidun Network Technology Co.') and the remaining scope (software development, IT integration, equipment sales and installation), the truth is clear. This is an asset-light system integrator and proxy seller. It designs intelligent systems, develops software, and acts as a middleman for purchasing, installing, and servicing robots and security equipment sourced from actual manufacturers.
